description_long: This is a small, round stool with a light-colored wooden seat and three slender, straight legs. The legs appear to be made of metal, likely steel or aluminum, and are evenly spaced around the perimeter of the seat for stability. The seat is flat and smooth, with no visible upholstery or padding, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance. There are no backrests, armrests, or footrests, emphasizing its simple and functional design. The stool is compact and lightweight, making it easy to move and suitable for various urban settings such as parks, bus stops, or public waiting areas. Its neutral color palette and clean lines allow it to blend seamlessly into modern or contemporary environments.
description: A compact, round stool with a light wooden seat and three slim metal legs, featuring a minimalist and functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round wooden seat and all three metal legs evenly spaced.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile of the seat and the alignment of two visible legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with the seat and all three legs visible, similar to the front but from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Side view from the opposite direction, again showing the slim seat and two legs in profile.
